narrative:
Buffalo/Seneca (precinct in Noble County) has 893 registered voters, with 50.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
